home.tagline: A neutral tools app that helps you find nearby services and information.
home.privacyFooter: This app does not track you. Tap Quick Exit any time to leave instantly.

install.title: Install MyTools
install.body: Add MyTools to your home screen for faster, offline-friendly access.

directory.title: Service Directory
directory.placeholder: Browse vetted services. You can filter by category.
directory.emptyState: We could not find any services yet. MRI will add vetted places here soon.
directory.locationNotice: If you allowed location, we only use an approximate position in your browser to sort results. Your exact location is not sent to our server.

hub.title: Information Hub
hub.placeholder: Curated articles on legal updates, health, and community resources.

emergency.title: Emergency Card
emergency.subtitle: Always available. Works offline. Tap a number to call.

defaultCenter.name: Kigali friendly health center
defaultCenter.note: MRI will update this with your nearest center as the directory grows.

tips.1: If you feel watched, tap Quick Exit immediately.
tips.2: Avoid discussing sensitive topics on shared devices.
tips.3: Share this app only with people you trust.
tips.4: Use a screen lock or biometrics on your phone.
tips.5: If you are in immediate danger, call the police number above.
tips.6: Clear your browser history after use if you share a device.

emergency.quickExitReminder: Quick Exit is always in the bottom-right corner.

onboarding.title: Welcome to MyTools
onboarding.body: A neutral app to find trusted services and information. You can use it without an account.
onboarding.tipBrowse: Browse the directory and Information Hub for vetted services and updates.
onboarding.tipInstall: When your browser offers it, add MyTools to your home screen for quicker access.
onboarding.tipQuickExit: Tap Quick Exit (bottom-right) any time to leave instantly and open a normal website.
